steps.title: Identify what makes a contrast work
steps.content: For a contrast to accomplish its purpose, the answer must present both things side-by-side. The prompt asks to contrast Minnesota's definition (size-based: at least 10 acres) with Wisconsin's (no size requirement). An effective answer must show both clearly.

steps.title: Find the choice that presents both definitions and their difference
steps.content: Choice D states Minnesota's definition (“an inland body of water of at least 10 acres”) and Wisconsin's (“doesn't take size into account”), then explicitly calls Minnesota's “more restrictive.” The other choices either address only one definition or acknowledge difference without explaining it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
